en: I'm trying to hold my breath Let it stay this
zh: 我試著屏住呼吸 讓這一刻停留
ja: 息を止めてみる このままでいてほしい
native: I'm trying to hold my breath Let it stay this
local: I'm trying to hold my breath Let it stay this

en: way
zh: 這樣
ja: このまま
native: way
local: way

en: Can't let this moment end You set off for dreaming me
zh: 不能讓這一刻結束 你啟程去夢想我
ja: この瞬間を終わらせたくない あなたは夢見る私へと旅立つ
native: Can't let this moment end You set off for dreaming me
local: Can't let this moment end You set off for dreaming me

en: Getting louder now Can you hear it look away
zh: 現在聲音越來越大 你能聽見嗎 轉過頭去
ja: だんだん大きくなる 聞こえる？目をそらして
native: Getting louder now Can you hear it look away
local: Getting louder now Can you hear it look away

en: Take my hand Will you share this with me
zh: 牽著我的手 你願意和我分享這一刻嗎
ja: 手を取って この瞬間を分かち合ってくれる？
native: Take my hand Will you share this with me
local: Take my hand Will you share this with me

en: I'm starting without you All the shine of a thousand spotlights
zh: 我開始沒有你 千盞聚光燈的光芒
ja: あなたなしで始めるよ 千のスポットライトの輝き
native: I'm starting without you All the shine of a thousand spotlights
local: I'm starting without you All the shine of a thousand spotlights

en: All the stars we steal from the night sky Will never be enough
zh: 我們從夜空偷來的所有星星 永遠不會足夠
ja: 夜空から盗んだ星たち それでも足りない
native: All the stars we steal from the night sky Will never be enough
local: All the stars we steal from the night sky Will never be enough

en: Never be enough Time to go are still too little
zh: 永遠不夠 離開的時間仍然太少
ja: 決して十分じゃない 行く時間はまだ足りない
native: Never be enough Time to go are still too little
local: Never be enough Time to go are still too little

en: These hands could hold the world But it'll never be enough
zh: 這雙手能擁抱整個世界 但永遠不夠
ja: この手は世界を抱けるけど それでも足りない
native: These hands could hold the world But it'll never be enough
local: These hands could hold the world But it'll never be enough

en: Never be enough
zh: 永遠不夠
ja: 決して十分じゃない
native: Never be enough
local: Never be enough

en: Never, never, never, never, never For me, for me
zh: 永遠，永遠，永遠，永遠，永遠 為了我，為了我
ja: 決して、決して、決して、決して、決して 私のために、私のために
native: Never, never, never, never, never For me, for me
local: Never, never, never, never, never For me, for me

en: Never be enough Never be enough
zh: 永遠不夠 永遠不夠
ja: 決して十分じゃない 決して十分じゃない
native: Never be enough Never be enough
local: Never be enough Never be enough

en: Never be enough For me, for me, for me

ja: 決して十分じゃない 私のために、私のために、私のために
native: Never be enough For me, for me, for me
local: Never be enough For me, for me, for me
